catalog_scope: Bundled public-facing sleeve catalog for the public UMG Block Library package. Entries are intentionally classified by promotion posture rather than treated as undifferentiated compatibility mirror material.
notes: This catalog supports the current public v0 tool surface while also distinguishing promoted reference sleeves from compatibility-only and historical sleeves.
The public lane is intentionally narrower than the private Resleever sleeve lane.
Payload/runtime ids may differ from public catalog ids; the catalog id is the stable public reference name.

sleeves.name: SLV.OPERATOR
sleeves.notes: Public-compatible operator sleeve carried forward from the private lane. Stable source exists, but naming/style normalization is still recommended before stronger public promotion posture.

sleeves.name: Sample Basic Minimal
sleeves.notes: Public-safe promoted reference sleeve. Valid compile success-path sample used for public smoke validation. Payload runtime id remains sleeve_basic.

sleeves.name: Neomagnetar Dynamic Persona Sleeve
sleeves.notes: Meaningful public compatibility/reference sleeve with multi-domain routing value. Public catalog id is stable; payload runtime id remains sleeve_neomagnetar_dynamic_persona_v1.
